title: AtlusAI Integration
description: Connect your AtlusAI account, browse external content, search for documents, and ingest assets into your template library.

steps.narration: The Discovery page is where you access content from AtlusAI. Right now, AtlusAI isn't connected yet -- you can see the notification prompting you to set up the integration.
Here in Integrations settings, you can see your external service connections. AtlusAI is connected, giving you access to their content library from within AtlusDeck.
The connection was authorized through a secure OAuth flow -- AtlusDeck only has read access to browse and search content. You can manage or revoke access from this page anytime.
After authorizing, the Discovery page now shows content from your AtlusAI library. You can browse documents organized by type and recency.
The browse view shows available documents from AtlusAI. Each document shows its title and content type. These are research reports, industry analyses, and presentation templates curated by AtlusAI.
Each document card gives you a quick preview of the content. You can decide which assets are worth ingesting into your template library based on the title and type.
The search bar at the top lets you find specific content. Let's search for cloud migration resources.
Here are the search results for cloud migration. You can see matching documents ranked by relevance.
Select a document you want to ingest. This will import the content into your AtlusDeck template library, making its slides available for deck generation.
The ingestion process is running for the selected document. AtlusDeck is importing and classifying the content.
Ingestion is complete. The document has been processed and its slides are now part of your library.
That's the AtlusAI Integration. Connect your account, discover relevant content, and ingest it into your library to give the AI more building blocks for personalized decks.
